THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT GREEN, JAMES PAUL ON THE COMPLAINT, SAID DEFENDANT TO HAVE JUDGMENT THEREON FOR $308.34 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $308.34, SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS HEREBY DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT JAMES PAUL GREEN SHALL HAVE AND RECOVER COSTS FROM PLAINTIFF JOSE MARENCO.
